rationale: BSON decoding type inconsistency (bson.D vs bson.M) in embedded docs; Go-driver-specific API behavior, no specific spec rule violated.
Panic when Registry is nil in SingleResult; defensive nil-check bug in internal API, no spec rule violated.
Write concern spec requires not sending empty write concern; driver serializes empty write concern when default WriteConcern is set.
Internal package dependency reversal between bson and bsonx; purely architectural refactor, no spec rule involved.
Custom BSON registry ignored by Cursor/SingleResult; internal API propagation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Nil pointer panic in changeStream.Decode on database-level watch; implementation crash, not a spec rule deviation.
ExtJSON parsing: large integer overflow should fall back to double; Go-specific numeric parsing edge case, no BSON spec rule explicitly violated.
Unstable internal bsonx package exposed in public API of stable packages; API design/packaging issue, no spec rule.
Inserting nil treated as empty document rather than error; spec doesn't explicitly define nil insert behavior, implementation judgment call.
Adding IndexOptions struct to clean up API design; ergonomics improvement, no spec conformance issue.
_id prepended vs appended for performance; server team recommendation, not a spec requirement.
Spec explicitly states write concern must not be sent for certain commands based on wire version; driver always serializes non-nil write concerns.
ListCollections should use read preference primary per spec; driver passes through database's read selector instead.
Panic instead of error return on invalid JSON input; error handling robustness bug, not a BSON spec violation.
SSL options incorrectly flagged as set when empty string passed; internal options-tracking bug, no spec rule.
Heartbeat uses context.Background() allowing indefinite wait; implementation defect, SDAM spec doesn't prescribe Go-specific context usage.
BSON map decoder panics on non-primitive string key types; Go reflection edge case, no BSON spec rule about map key types.
serverSelectionTimeoutMS URI option ignored; spec requires URI options to override defaults but driver uses hardcoded 30s.
GridFS upload/download data corruption and panic; implementation bugs in chunk handling, not a specific GridFS spec rule violation.
ChangeStream Next doesn't getMore after error; empty description, insufficient detail to determine spec rule violation.
GridFS spec requires only last chunk may have length < chunkSize; implementation explicitly notes spec compliance fix.
Encoding Go int as int32 vs int64 improvement; no BSON spec rule dictating which integer type to use for Go int.
Race condition in GridFS test with race detector; test infrastructure/concurrency bug, not a spec conformance issue.
CRUD spec requires error when update has no modifier; driver erases document fields instead of returning error.
Testing package imported in production code via internal package; packaging/dependency issue, no spec rule.
Adding topology state to server selection errors for diagnostics; UX improvement, no spec rule on error message content.
MaxConnIdleTime option not releasing idle connections; connection pool implementation bug, insufficient detail to name specific CMAP spec rule.
README still lists v3.2 as minimum MongoDB version; documentation typo/outdated content, no spec involvement.
README/doc suggested nil filter in Find but it causes error; documentation fix, no spec rule.
Incorrect code example in godoc for Pipeline; documentation bug, no spec rule.
ExtJSON number formatting corrupts 3E-5 to '3E-5.0'; floating-point string formatting bug, no specific BSON/ExtJSON spec rule violated.
Document SessionContext is not goroutine safe; documentation improvement, no spec rule about goroutine safety.
Inconsistent use of time.Duration vs int64 for MaxTime options; Go API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule.
Registry prevents looking up codecs for maps with non-string keys; API restriction removal, no BSON spec requirement.
BulkWrite API exposes internal x/driver types confusingly; API design/documentation improvement, no spec rule.

Refactor cursor to batch model for performance; internal architecture improvement, no spec rule about cursor iteration granularity.
Refactor Cursor from interface to struct and make changeStream public; Go idiomatic API refactor, no spec rule.
Panic on cursor Close with dead server; nil pointer dereference implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.

Test assertion weakened/gated for new server versions per SPEC-1211; test compatibility fix, not a driver behavior bug.

Maps in structs not zeroed on BSON decode; documentation improvement for Go-specific behavior, no BSON spec rule.
